goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: Accept the grocery/formula/intake milestone. Current type/build, focused formula/accessibility/purchase evidence, new grocery E2E, both protected E2Es, and integrity pass. Final remaining slice is cooking UI over existing confirmed atomic FEFO, leftover, and guarded undo services; no migration or new substitution model is justified.

worker_package.objective: Implement linked planned-meal cooking entry; detailed server-derived batch/location/expiry/quantity review; quantity correction, explicit no-deduction/inaccurate handling, and one-cook compatible product alternative; literal confirmation only; multiple linked leftovers; post-cook Pantry/planner refresh/navigation; guarded undo with conflicts/recovery; and deterministic cooking E2E over existing transaction seams.
verify: Full lint/type/unit/integration/OpenAPI and isolated full-source webpack build.
New isolated cooking E2E proving no pre-confirm deduction, linked meal, batch review/adjustments, confirmation, leftovers, refresh, undo/conflicts, 390/768/1280 keyboard/axe/screenshots/no errors.
Fresh disposable migrations/db check and final port/hash/diff/status integrity.
stop_if: Any pre-confirm deduction, FEFO/transaction/conflict/ActorContext/origin weakening or silent retry.
Manual grocery state overwritten or protected hashes drift.
Live/shared/secret/normal data or unrelated files required.

evidence: T080 proves accepted grocery milestone/full gates.
Existing services already implement confirmed atomic FEFO, attribution, leftovers, and guarded undo.
Cooking UI lacks linked meal, batch review, refresh, and undo recovery.

parallel_safety.rationale: Cooking services/UI/E2E and serial protected oracles are coupled.

missing_evidence: Complete rendered cooking UI and oracle
